last_concepts: market_reaction: Micron (MU) +19% from UBS analyst tripling price target ($535 → $1,625) — one spreadsheet update adds $100B in market cap before noon — how market value actually gets created
educational: Win rate vs. Expectancy — 65% win rate still loses money when average loss is 4× average win — the wrong number traders track after every trade

algo_automation: Drawdown duration vs. depth — JT as the algo running 7 weeks inside parameters while the human who built him slowly loses faith not because the system broke but because uncertainty is hard to hold
